name: Feature request
about: A capability the project does not have yet
labels: enhancement

## What you want

<!-- One paragraph. What capability is missing, what would having it let you do. -->

## Use case

<!-- Concrete scenario where this would help. "When I do X, I want Y" is much
     more actionable than "It would be cool if…". -->

## Suggested approach (optional)

<!-- If you have a design sketch — keyboard binding, CLI surface, MCP tool name,
     formula — drop it here. Not required; even a rough idea helps. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Anything you already tried. Workarounds, other tools, CLI scripts. -->

## Anything else

<!-- Background, links to relevant prior art, related issues. -->
